narrative:
Precinct Ironton 2A (precinct in Lawrence County) has 215 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
